_comments.snap_distance: Distance in drawing units to snap pour points to flow network
_comments.breach_distance: Max breach channel length in cells
_comments.min_catchment_area: Minimum catchment area in square drawing units
_comments.simplify_tolerance: Polygon simplification tolerance in drawing units (0 = none)
_comments.flow_accumulation_threshold: Number of upstream cells to define a stream channel
_comments.burn_pipes: Path to pipe GeoJSON for DEM burning (null = disabled)
_comments.burn_depth: Depth to burn pipes into DEM in drawing units
